questions.question: What onetime Yugoslav republic is shaped like a boomerang?
Who once boasted in a Times Square billboard: "#3 in Late Night"?
What empire's end resulted in the creation of Syria, Lebanon, Iraq, Transjordan and Palestine?
What's a video cameraman doing when he "juices the brick"?
What signature Vince Lombardi line did John Wayne deliver years earlier in the movie Trouble Along the Way?
questions.answer: "Winning isn't everything, it's the only thing"

questions.question: What magazine gives out "Heinous Husband" awards?
